name: DBML ER Diagrams (PFonseca fork)
description: Render dbml code blocks as entity-relationship diagrams with orthogonal, dbdiagram.io-style routing. Fork of dbml-erd by Wilmar Rojas Avendaño, adding @include, live auto-reload and configurable crow's foot style.
author: Wilmar Rojas Avendaño; fork by Pedro Fonseca
